title: phaseolus vulgaris var. doloensis
intro: Phaseolus vulgaris var. doloensis is a variety of common bean, specifically a type of white kidney bean native to the Himalayan foothills. It is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to inhibit alpha-amylase, an enzyme that breaks down carbohydrates into glucose. The health benefits of Phaseolus vulgaris var. doloensis include its potential to aid in weight management and blood sugar control, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include dried or powdered beans, which can be used in teas, capsules, or other supplements to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
